action.reasoning: Observation: Achieved baseline mIoU=0.2507 (val peak 0.2466) with ResNet50-FCN after 5 epochs; loss curve shows steady decline from ~5.0 to ~1.1 indicating underfitting and room for improvement; pipeline (label remapping 0->255/1-150->0-149, DataParallel on 4 GPUs, JSONL logging, predict contract with batched 512-resize + NN resize to orig res, best.pt saving) now fully functional and stable. Analysis: Simple FCN limits performance but uses listed pretrained backbone (25M params, well under 1B limit); longer training + poly LR decay + color augmentations will boost mIoU without architecture change or OOM risk (prior run ~45min for 5 epochs). Decision: Update only train.py with epochs=15, poly scheduler, color jitter augs, num_workers=8, val_bs=32; run training then submit best.pt for eval to get improved score and confirm timing before next upgrades (e.g. DeepLabV3 head or MIT-B5 backbone).
